title: Promote dynamic-types and export FFI traceability in platform-spec

source.subject: feat(v0.3): bump compiler, promote dynamic-types spec, export FFI traceability

body:
Platform-spec and orchestration docs cross-link export FFI decisions to compiler commits for v0.3 auditability.
